title: BlueCollar.jobs
subtitle: Blue Collar Jobs, 31 Countries
shortDescription: Blue collar jobs in 31 countries! 17 sectors, instant alerts, free app.
fullDescription:
BlueCollar.jobs — The #1 app for finding blue collar, skilled trade and labor jobs across 31 countries. Warehouse, factory, construction, logistics, delivery, retail and more — your next job is here.

Stop scrolling through dozens of job sites. BlueCollar.jobs aggregates thousands of job listings from top employers, updated daily, and delivers them straight to you.

★ 17 SECTORS, THOUSANDS OF JOBS

● Logistics & Warehousing
● Manufacturing & Production
● Retail & Stores
● Construction & Building
● Food & Beverage
● Automotive
● Textile & Garment
● Mining
● Healthcare & Caregiving
● Hospitality & Tourism
● Agriculture
● Security
● Facility Management
● Metal & Steel
● Chemicals
● E-commerce & Delivery
● Telecommunications

★ 31 COUNTRIES, ONE APP

USA, UK, Germany, Turkey, India, Brazil, Indonesia, Russia, Mexico, Japan, Philippines, Thailand, Canada, Australia, France, Italy, Spain, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, South Korea, Argentina, UAE, Vietnam, Poland, Malaysia, Colombia, South Africa, Portugal, Netherlands, Pakistan, and Sweden.

★ KEY FEATURES

● Follow Companies & Get Alerts
Follow employers you want to work for and get instant push notifications when they post new openings. Never miss an opportunity.

● Save Jobs
Bookmark listings you like and come back to them anytime.

● Smart Filters
Filter by sector, city, company, and job type. Find the right job in seconds.

● 100% Free
All core features are completely free. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited alerts and an ad-free experience.

★ WHY BLUECOLLAR.JOBS?

✓ All blue collar jobs in one place
✓ Daily-updated job listings
✓ Available in 19 languages
✓ Lightweight, fast, and easy to use
✓ No account required to start browsing
✓ Forklift operator, driver, warehouse worker, welder, cook, cleaner — whatever you need

Find your next job with BlueCollar.jobs. Download now and start your search today!
